case_title: DISCOVER BANK VS. C F FRANKENY

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING (TRANSACTION ID # 16112041) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK
